# Explicit translation drops (field paths relative to ingress wire).
# Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines ignored.
# Update this file in the same PR as fidelity work that starts preserving a field.

# Multi-choice (policy: n=1 only; n>1 rejected before translate)
openai.n>1
google.generation_config.candidate_count>1

# Sampling / determinism extras not yet modeled in canonical (or OpenAI-only
# round-trip only — not remapped on Anthropic/Google egress yet)
openai.logprobs
openai.top_logprobs
openai.logit_bias
# seed / frequency_penalty / presence_penalty / response_format / reasoning_effort
# are carried on OpenAI→OpenAI; dropped on Anthropic egress (no native field).
# openai.seed → Anthropic drop
# openai.frequency_penalty → Anthropic drop
# openai.presence_penalty → Anthropic drop
# openai.response_format → Anthropic/Google mapping may still be partial
# openai.image_url.detail → Anthropic/Google drop (OpenAI round-trip only)

# Anthropic prompt caching breakpoints — passthrough only (#41 Option B)
anthropic.system[].cache_control
anthropic.messages[].content[].cache_control
anthropic.tools[].cache_control

# OpenAI stream options not rebuilt on non-OpenAI egress
openai.stream_options

# Vendor-specific metadata dropped cross-family
openai.user
